ddls:
CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "property_name" TEXT /* Name of the property */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the property */,
  "number_of_units" INTEGER /* Total number of units in the property */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the property location */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the property location */,
  "property_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_property_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_manager_id") REFERENCES property_managers ("property_manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "residents" (
  "resident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resident */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the resident */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the resident */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the resident */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the resident */,
  "date_moved_in" TEXT /* Date when the resident moved in */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property where the resident lives */,
  "unit_number" INTEGER /* Unit number of the resident */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_residents_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for login purposes */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, staff) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "services" (
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service */,
  "service_name" TEXT /* Name of the service (e.g., Maintenance, Utilities) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the service */,
  "service_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the service category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_services_service_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_category_id") REFERENCES service_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "service_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Maintenance, Utilities) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "service_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service type */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the service category */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the service type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the service type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_types_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES service_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "service_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service request */,
  "resident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resident making the request */,
  "service_id" INTEGER /* ID of the service requested */,
  "date_requested" TEXT /* Date when the service was requested */,
  "date_provided" TEXT /* Date when the service was provided */,
  "other_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the service request */,
  "request_status" TEXT /* Current status of the service request (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_requests_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_id") REFERENCES services ("service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_requests_resident_id FOREIGN KEY ("resident_id") REFERENCES residents ("resident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "request_id" INTEGER /* ID of the service request linked to the feedback */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the resident (e.g., 1-5 scale) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the resident */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was submitted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_request_id FOREIGN KEY ("request_id") REFERENCES service_requests ("request_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "service_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status entry */,
  "request_id" INTEGER /* ID of the service request linked to the status */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the service request (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last status update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_status_request_id FOREIGN KEY ("request_id") REFERENCES service_requests ("request_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "request_id" INTEGER /* ID of the service request linked to the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "sent_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was sent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_request_id FOREIGN KEY ("request_id") REFERENCES service_requests ("request_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attachments" (
  "attachment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attachment */,
  "request_id" INTEGER /* ID of the service request linked to the attachment */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path of the attached document */,
  "uploaded_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the attachment was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attachment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attachments_request_id FOREIGN KEY ("request_id") REFERENCES service_requests ("request_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "service_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "request_id" INTEGER /* ID of the service request linked to the log */,
  "activity" TEXT /* Description of the activity performed */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the activity was logged */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_logs_request_id FOREIGN KEY ("request_id") REFERENCES service_requests ("request_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_managers" (
  "property_manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property manager */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the property manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the property manager */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the property manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "service_providers" (
  "service_provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service provider */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the service provider */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the service provider */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the service provider */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_provider_id")
)
